```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement backup automation and verification"
---
# Backup Automation
## Task
Automate backups and verify restore capability.
## Requirements
1. Schedule automatic backups (hourly/daily/weekly). 2. Backup databases, configs, and storage.
3. Verify backup integrity after creation. 4. Test restore procedure monthly.
5. Alert on backup failures.
## Constraints
- Encrypt backups. Store offsite. Verify integrity. Test restores. Alert on failure.
## Success Criteria
- Backups automated and verified. Restores tested. Failures alerted. Offsite storage.
```
